g.text: Application (e.g. TOE) — L4 / IP layer 위
MAC engine (DCMAC) — 1) Preamble + SFD prepend, 2) Pad to ≥ 46B if needed, 3) Compute FCS over (DA..Payload), 4) Insert IFG (≥ 12B)
PCS — 64b/66b encode + scramble, RS-FEC parity (100G+), Lane distribute + AM insert
PMA / PMD — SerDes lane (e.g. 4 × 25G NRZ or 4 × 53G PAM4)
